data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Priority triage (urgent vs routine)', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or tested. While the linked use case mentions prioritizing urgent appointments for same-day slots, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating how this prioritization is executed or validated. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement, as it lacks the necessary validation.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or execution of priority triage functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the priority triage functionality.
